scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k -n infra,temporal,server,client "bun run dev:infra" "bun run dev:temporal" "DAOFLOW_ENABLE_TEMPORAL=true bun --env-file .env --filter @daoflow/server dev" "bun --filter @daoflow/client dev"
scripts.build: bun --filter @daoflow/shared build && bun --filter @daoflow/cli build && bun --filter @daoflow/server build && bun --filter @daoflow/client build && bun --filter @daoflow/mcp build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/server packages/client packages/cli packages/mcp
scripts.test:unit: bun test scripts/supervise-e2e-server.test.ts && bun --filter @daoflow/server test && bun --filter @daoflow/client test && bun --filter @daoflow/cli test && bun --filter @daoflow/mcp test
scripts.test:webhook-recovery: bun run --filter @daoflow/server test -- db/services/webhook-delivery-recovery.test.ts db/services/webhook-delivery-recovery-legacy.test.ts db/services/webhook-delivery-recovery-ledger.test.ts db/services/webhook-delivery-recovery-read.test.ts routes/webhook-push-recovery.test.ts webhook-delivery-recovery-routes.test.ts webhooks.test.ts trigger-deploy-source-revalidation.test.ts && bun run --filter @daoflow/client test -- GitProvidersTab.test.tsx tone-utils.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:main && bun run test:e2e:bootstrap && bun run test:e2e:cli
scripts.verify: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run contracts:check && bun run readiness:check && bun run test:unit
scripts.db:rebuild: bun run db:reset && bun run db:migrate && bun run db:seed
